title: Recover sold-out hero SKUs
hypothesis: CVR improves by replacing dead-end Sold Out tiles with waitlist, alternates, or bundle substitutes. Collection shows Organic Sleep Tea, Heartburn Tea, Premium Sencha, and Unwind marked Sold Out while samplers remain available.
primary_change: On sold-out tiles, show Notify me, Try sampler ($2), or Shop similar blend with one-click add.
decision_rule: Ship if collection CTR to purchasable SKUs rises without increasing bounce.

title: Bundle ritual starter under $50 threshold
hypothesis: AOV and conversion rise when homepage ritual block becomes a shoppable bundle crossing the free-shipping threshold. Banner states FREE SHIPPING ON ALL $50+ ORDERS; ritual items (infuser $5, mug $8, tea bags $5) are priced below threshold individually.
primary_change: Add Steep Into Something Sacred bundle: one tea + infuser + mug at $52 with free shipping callout.
decision_rule: Ship if AOV rises ≥$6 and bundle attach rate ≥8% without hurting homepage bounce.

title: Mission-first homepage cards
hypothesis: CVR improves when need blocks (Sleep, Immune, Energy, Digestion) include price, stock status, and add-to-cart inline. Homepage already segments by mission but routes to SHOP links without inline purchase.
primary_change: Add price, stock badge, and Add to cart on each mission card; gray out sold-out with waitlist.
decision_rule: Ship if homepage ATC rate improves without hurting PDP conversion.

title: Sampler-to-loose-leaf upsell
hypothesis: AOV rises when $2 samplers surface a one-click upgrade to $12–$13 loose-leaf bag on PDP and post-add-to-cart. Collection promotes Zen Rojas Loose Leaf Samplers From $2 adjacent to full-size teas.
primary_change: On sampler and full-size PDPs, show Try sampler / Upgrade to full bag module with savings copy.
decision_rule: Ship if upgrade rate ≥15% without cannibalizing full-size first-purchase CVR.

title: Empty cart ritual nudge
hypothesis: Cart abandonment drops when empty cart shows best-sellers and free-shipping progress instead of a dead end. Cart page shows Your cart is currently empty with only Continue browsing.
primary_change: Replace empty cart with 3 in-stock picks, $50 free-shipping progress bar, and sampler entry.
decision_rule: Ship if empty-cart sessions adding an item rise ≥20% without hurting checkout start rate.

title: Veteran story subscription hook
hypothesis: Repeat purchase rate improves by tying veteran-owned brand story to a monthly tea ritual subscription. About page emphasizes calm ritual and 100% organic sourcing — strong retention narrative without reorder mechanic.
primary_change: Add Monthly Ritual Box subscription CTA on About and order confirmation with blend rotation.
decision_rule: Ship if 90-day repeat rate improves without increasing churn on first order.

title: Sleep landing page for paid search
hypothesis: Paid and organic sleep-intent traffic converts better on a dedicated landing page than a sold-out collection tile. Organic Sleep Tea PDP has rich chamomile/passionflower copy but collection marks SKU sold out.
primary_change: Launch /sleep-tea/ with PDP copy, reviews, waitlist, and sampler fallback.
decision_rule: Ship if sleep landing CVR beats collection entry by ≥25%.

title: Immune wellness content hub
hypothesis: Organic acquisition rises with an immune-support hub matching Bodyguard's ingredient story. Bodyguard PDP details sencha, ginger, elderflower benefits — no standalone SEO hub.
primary_change: Create /immune-support/ hub linking Bodyguard PDP, brewing guide, and sampler.
decision_rule: Ship if hub drives ≥500 organic sessions/month with CVR ≥ collection average.

title: Reorder email for in-stock SKUs
hypothesis: Repeat purchase rate improves with timed reorder prompts based on 20-cup bag consumption. Bodyguard PDP states 20 cups (40g) per bag and daily use instructions — natural reorder window.
primary_change: Send day-25 reorder email with one-click cart prefilled for last purchase.
decision_rule: Ship if repeat rate rises ≥5pp without increasing unsubscribe rate.

title: Add product structured data
hypothesis: Organic CTR and rich results improve when Product JSON-LD is present on in-stock PDPs. Technical crawl found no JSON-LD on captured pages.
primary_change: Add Product schema (price, availability, reviews) to all PDP templates.
decision_rule: Ship if rich-result impressions appear within 30 days without markup errors.
